title: Token Holder List
description: Retrieve a ranked, paginated list of holders for any ERC-20 token contract — includes balance, percent of total supply, and address for each holder. Foundational chains only.
useCase: Build a token holder leaderboard showing the top 100 holders of any ERC-20 — display wallet addresses, balances, and ownership percentages for community dashboards.

keyParams.chainName: Foundational chain only: eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet
